args.query: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE LOWER(Name) LIKE '%ai%' OR LOWER(Name) LIKE '%processing%' OR LOWER(Name) LIKE '%unit%' OR LOWER(Description) LIKE '%ai%' OR LOWER(Description) LIKE '%processing%' OR LOWER(Description) LIKE '%unit%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE LOWER(Name) LIKE '%ai%' OR LOWER(Name) LIKE '%processing%' OR LOWER(Name) LIKE '%unit%' OR LOWER(Description) LIKE '%ai%' OR LOWER(Description) LIKE '%processing%' OR LOWER(Description) LIKE '%unit%';

args.query: SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, o.Status, oi.Id AS OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, oi.Quantity, oi.UnitPrice, p.Name AS ProductName, p.Description FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, o.Status, oi.Id AS OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, oi.Quantity, oi.UnitPrice, p.Name AS ProductName, p.Description FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';
